headline: Unveiling M&T Bank (MTB) Q1 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for M&T Bank (MTB), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
